title: No End Crystals
body:
# No End Crystals

- Disables crafting end crystals

- If you have an end crystal, you will have the crystal removed and be refunded the 7 glass, 1 eye of ender, and 1 ghast tear

-------------------------------------------------------

### End crystals will still spawn during the dragon fight
### Using this datapack will make it impossible to respawn the ender dragon without using a seperate mod
